mapper.update: update xuebiChain.user_account set money = money - #{amount} where public_key = #{public_key} and money >= #{amount} and is_deleted = 0
update xuebiChain.user_account set money = money + #{amount} where public_key = #{public_key} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT balance FROM user WHERE public_key = #{publicKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction_record (sender_address, recipient_address, amount, timestamp, resource_id, resource_name, resource_type, record_type, tx_hash, block_number) VALUES (#{senderAddress}, #{recipientAddress}, #{amount}, #{timestamp}, #{resourceId}, #{resourceName}, #{resourceType}, #{recordType}, #{txHash}, #{blockNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT sender_address AS senderAddress, recipient_address AS recipientAddress, amount, timestamp, resource_id AS resourceId, resource_name AS resourceName, record_type AS recordType, tx_hash AS txHash, block_number AS blockNumber FROM transaction_record WHERE sender_address = #{address} OR recipient_address = #{address} ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
